response.justification: While the candidate meets the 15-year experience requirement and demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals across multiple domains, they lack the core qualification for this role: demonstrated AI/ML expertise and AI-powered products. The current role mentions AI infrastructure work, but only for 2–3 months, providing insufficient evidence of the strategic AI knowledge and product-building experience required for a director-level AI Strategy position. The absence of an advanced degree in an AI-related field compounds this fundamental gap.
strengths: 19+ years of broad software engineering experience across web, mobile, desktop, and infrastructure domains
Proven platform and infrastructure-building capability, including open-source projects and microservices systems handling millions of requests
Demonstrated technical leadership through workshops, teaching, open-source community contributions, and staff-level roles
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, products, or platforms; AI work limited to recent 2–3 months of infrastructure tooling
Lacks preferred advanced degree in AI-related field; education is in general computer science and design photography
No evidence of strategic customer engagement on cloud or AI adoption, or thought leadership in AI innovation

key_factors.factor: AI expertise and demonstrated AI products
Years of software engineering experience (15+ required)
